basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) has released the official Research Associate (RA) Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a PhD in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or Chemical Engineering, or an M.E./ M.Tech. with three years of research, design, and development experience can apply online up to 08 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link ar

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Metallurgical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering OR ME/MTech with 3 years of research, design and development experience.
qualification.details: PhD in Metallurgical Engineering/ Materials Science and Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering. ME/MTech in the above-mentioned branches with 3 years of research, design and development experience after ME/MTech.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 58,000 pm for 1st and 2nd year, Rs. 61,000 pm for 3rd Year. HRA additional.
salary_details.details: For 1st and 2nd year: Rs. 58,000 pm + HRA additional. For 3rd Year: Rs. 61,000 pm + HRA additional.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Research Associate (RA) post at IIT Hyderabad is 08-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Metallurgical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or Chemical Engineering. Alternatively, an ME/MTech with 3 years of relevant research, design, and development experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate (RA) position is 35 years. Age relaxations may apply for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per government regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Associate (RA) is Rs. 58,000 per month for the first and second year, and Rs. 61,000 per month for the third year. Additional House Rent Allowance (HRA) will be provided as per norms.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate (RA) post at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply online through the Google form link provided on the official IIT Hyderabad website. Ensure all details are filled correctly and documents are uploaded as per the instructions.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding application fees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate (RA) position at IIT Hyderabad will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Research Associate (RA) position at IIT Hyderabad is a project-based role, likely funded by a specific research project. This means the tenure of employment is usually tied to the duration of the project.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Hyderabad located?
faq.answer: IIT Hyderabad is located in Sangareddy, Telangana, with the pincode 502284. The institute is a prominent technical education and research institution in India.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with ME/MTech apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates holding an ME/MTech degree are eligible if they have accumulated at least 3 years of research, design, and development experience after completing their ME/MTech.
